result: Drifting-stream regression, evolvent (forgetting-RLS) vs online-SGD vs backprop-MLP. MIXED: A wins cold-start sample-efficiency 5/5, plain RLS windup-limited long-run; strong hypothesis unsupported by plain RLS.
